heroSubtext: Manager at Deloitte and 7 years in Salesforce. I turn business processes into AI and CRM solutions that reach production — across Industrial, Construction and Media & Telco.
statementBig: I start with the business process, not the tool.
statementLeft: Before touching the technology, I understand how the business works. I translate complex needs into operating models, Salesforce architectures and AI solutions that work in real environments — with the sector judgment that comes from years in Industrial, Construction and Media & Telco.
statementRight: Business understanding. Technical judgment. 7 years in Salesforce. Focus on applied AI. Real delivery, from idea to production, in enterprise environments.
expAside: I connect business, technology and execution. I don't sell tools: I design how they fit into a system the organization can actually operate.
casesAside: Anonymized transformation, AI and Salesforce projects. No logos or confidential information — just the problem, the role, the approach and the outcome.
ideasAside: I share ideas on technology, digital transformation, Salesforce, applied AI, cloud architecture and digital product.
newsPitch: Get every issue in your inbox: actionable ideas on AI, Salesforce, cloud and transformation. No noise, unsubscribe anytime.
aboutText1: I'm Francisco Sánchez Nieves. I connect business, architecture and delivery to turn complex problems into digital solutions that reach production — with Salesforce, applied AI, cloud and judgment.
aboutText2: Today I lead transformation projects as a Manager in technology consulting. But the thread goes back a long way.
